requirement_topic.zh: CONUEE 能效 NOM 适用范围核查
requirement_topic.zht: CONUEE 能效 NOM 適用範圍核查

summary.en: CONUEE administers Mexico's energy-efficiency NOM program. As of this dataset version, grid-tied PV inverters should be screened against the current CONUEE NOM list rather than assumed to have a dedicated inverter efficiency NOM. If the inverter is bundled with covered equipment, an external power supply, controls, standby functions, or other regulated components, a separate energy-efficiency NOM may be triggered.
summary.zh: CONUEE 负责墨西哥能效 NOM 体系。截至本数据集版本，并网光伏逆变器应根据 CONUEE 当前 NOM 清单进行筛查，而不能假定存在专门的逆变器能效 NOM。如果逆变器与受管制设备、外置电源、控制器、待机功能或其他受管制部件捆绑，可能触发单独的能效 NOM。
summary.zht: CONUEE 負責墨西哥能效 NOM 體系。截至本資料集版本，併網光伏逆變器應根據 CONUEE 當前 NOM 清單進行篩查，而不能假定存在專門的逆變器能效 NOM。如果逆變器與受管制設備、外置電源、控制器、待機功能或其他受管制部件捆綁，可能觸發單獨的能效 NOM。

standards_or_laws: Applicable NOM-ENER requirements where the imported configuration includes covered equipment or components

summary.en: China efficiency claims, CEC-style inverter efficiency data, IEC efficiency measurements, or CGC/CQC performance certificates can support product marketing and engineering review, but they do not determine whether a Mexican NOM-ENER applies.
summary.zh: 中国能效声明、类似 CEC 的逆变器效率数据、IEC 效率测量或 CGC/CQC 性能证书可支持产品营销和工程审查，但不能决定墨西哥 NOM-ENER 是否适用。
summary.zht: 中國能效聲明、類似 CEC 的逆變器效率資料、IEC 效率測量或 CGC/CQC 性能證書可支持產品行銷和工程審查，但不能決定墨西哥 NOM-ENER 是否適用。

standards_or_laws: CGC/CQC voluntary PV inverter performance certification
IEC efficiency measurement evidence where available

gap.en: The compliance gap is a scope-screening task. The importer should document why no CONUEE NOM applies to the standalone inverter, or identify and certify any covered bundled component before customs entry.
gap.zh: 合规差距是适用范围筛查。进口商应记录为何独立逆变器不适用 CONUEE NOM，或在海关进口前识别并认证任何受管制的捆绑部件。
gap.zht: 合規差距是適用範圍篩查。進口商應記錄為何獨立逆變器不適用 CONUEE NOM，或在海關進口前識別並認證任何受管制的捆綁部件。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional mandatory — energy-efficiency NOM compliance is mandatory when a listed CONUEE NOM covers the product or bundled component.
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — Chinese efficiency or performance certificates do not replace Mexican NOM-ENER determinations.

compliance_verdict.en: Informational only. Include a CONUEE NOM scope check in the import file even if no dedicated grid-tied inverter efficiency NOM is found.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅供参考。即使未发现专门的并网逆变器能效 NOM，也应在进口文件中纳入 CONUEE NOM 适用范围核查。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅供參考。即使未發現專門的併網逆變器能效 NOM，也應在進口文件中納入 CONUEE NOM 適用範圍核查。
